title: “Low IQs”: President slams Candace Owens, Tucker Carlson and other podcasters, calls them losers chasing cheap publicity
summary_full: Donald Trump strongly criticized Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens and Alex Jones in a Truth Social post, calling them attention-seeking and irrelevant. The four commentators had raised concerns about his approach and decisions. Trump rejected their views, saying they do not represent his supporters, making the disagreement a clear and public split within his own conservative circle.
